seoDescription: Understand how dryAPI handles data processing, retention, and security controls.

elements.text: We minimize collection, apply security controls at every layer, and maintain clear policy language so teams can assess risk confidently.

hero.heading: Privacy Policy
hero.body: This policy describes how we process account, billing, and request metadata while preserving user trust and legal compliance.

sections.title: Data Collection Principles
sections.body: We collect only what is necessary to operate, secure, and improve the service.

cards.title: Account Data
cards.description: Contact and identity details needed to administer accounts and support.

cards.title: Usage Metadata
cards.description: Operational metadata required for billing integrity and abuse prevention.

cards.title: Support Records
cards.description: Limited support context used to resolve issues and improve reliability.

sections.title: Security And Retention Controls
sections.body: We apply layered controls and explicit retention boundaries to sensitive operational data.

cards.title: Access Restrictions
cards.description: Limit data access through role-based controls and internal policies.

cards.title: Retention Windows
cards.description: Use bounded retention and archival workflows for non-hot path records.

cards.title: Request Inquiries
cards.description: Contact us for policy clarifications and compliance review support.

contactPanel.heading: Need privacy policy clarification?
contactPanel.body: Our team can help your legal and security stakeholders review data handling details.
contactPanel.responseTime: Policy inquiries answered in one business day
